name: "🎨 Design Feedback"

---

## 🎨 What Part of the Design?

Which screen, element, or flow are you giving feedback on?

---

## 🧠 Your Experience

How does this design feel to YOU? Examples:
- "This is hard to read because..."
- "I love how this makes me feel..."
- "The colors make it hard to focus..."
- "This layout helps me understand..."

---

## 🚦 Accessibility Context (if relevant)

- [ ] Text size/readability
- [ ] Color contrast
- [ ] Motion/animations
- [ ] Focus/navigation
- [ ] Sensory overload
- [ ] Executive function (too many choices)
- [ ] Other: ________

---

## 💡 Your Suggestion

What would work better for you?

---

## 📸 Reference Images

If you have examples of designs that work well for your brain, please share.

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Anything else that would help us understand?

---

*Design is not how it looks. Design is how it works for you.* 🏛️✨
